description: next/ v2.0 — ISA-95 physical asset / tooling (e.g. an injection mould, die, fixture). Neutral generalization of 'mould'. USES_TOOL target of machine profiles; can be set up on an EquipmentUnit.

attributes.name: tool_type
attributes.description: Type of tooling (e.g. mould, die, fixture).

attributes.name: unit_ref
attributes.description: FK to EquipmentUnit.unit_id (SET_UP_ON) — where the tool is currently set up.

relationships.description: The unit/machine the tool is currently set up on.

isa95.note: ISA-95 PhysicalAsset (tooling). USES_TOOL target of machine profiles; neutral replacement for 'Mould'.
